title: 「So long as」句型
titleEn: Using So long as to express a condition

source.file: Sentence Structure 60 -「So long as」表達「只要／條件是」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: So long as + condition clause, + result / permission / promise clause

formulas.formula: So long as + condition clause, + result / permission / promise clause
Result / permission / promise clause + so long as + condition clause

example: So long as you practise every day, you will improve your English.
exampleZh: 只要你每天練習，你的英文就會進步。

examples.en: So long as you practise every day, you will improve your English.
examples.zh: 只要你每天練習，你的英文就會進步。
examples.highlight: So long as you practise every day

meaning.zh: So long as 表示一項必須符合的條件，意思是 provided that、on condition that 或「只要／前提是／條件是」。

rules.en: So long as introduces a condition that must be met before the result, permission or promise applies.
rules.zh: So long as 表示一項必須符合的條件；只有在條件成立後，相關結果、許可或承諾才會適用。
examples: So long as you keep the receipt, you can return the item.

rules.en: When referring to the future, normally use the present tense after so long as rather than will.
rules.zh: 談及未來時，so long as 後面的條件子句通常使用現在式，而不使用 will。
examples: So long as you practise regularly, you will improve.

rules.en: When the so long as clause comes first, normally put a comma after it. A final so long as clause normally needs no comma.
rules.zh: So long as 子句放在句首時，通常在子句後加逗號；放在句尾時通常不需要逗號。
examples: So long as the weather stays dry, we can play outside.
We can play outside so long as the weather stays dry.

rules.en: So long as can introduce a negative condition.
rules.zh: So long as 可以表達否定條件，否定形式可包括 do not、does not、is not、are not、cannot、no one 或 nothing。
examples: So long as you do not make too much noise, you may stay here.

rules.en: When both mean provided that, so long as and as long as are normally interchangeable. As long as is more common and neutral; so long as can stress the importance of the condition.
rules.zh: 當兩者都表示「只要」時，so long as 和 as long as 通常可以互換。As long as 在日常英語中較常見、語氣較中性；so long as 往往稍為加強條件的重要性。
examples: So long as you are happy, I am happy.
As long as you are happy, I am happy.

benefits.en: This structure tells the listener exactly what must happen before a result, permission or promise applies.
benefits.zh: 這個句型能清楚告訴對方：必須符合甚麼條件，某個結果、許可或承諾才會成立。

benefits.en: You can use it when explaining what someone may do under a particular condition.
benefits.zh: 當你要說明某人在甚麼條件下可以做某件事時，這個句型非常實用。

benefits.en: Compared with a simple if sentence, so long as can make the condition sound slightly more important.
benefits.zh: 與普通的 if 句相比，so long as 可以稍為加強條件的重要性。

benefits.en: The condition can appear at the beginning or the end of the sentence.
benefits.zh: 條件可以放在句首或句尾，讓你不需要每次都使用相同的句子排列方式。

benefits.en: Once you remember the frame “So long as…, …”, you can quickly explain conditions in discussions, presentations and everyday conversations.
benefits.zh: 記住「So long as…, …」這個框架後，你可以在討論、簡報和日常對話中迅速說明條件。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using so long as to express the same condition.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
Follow the first-word hint to decide whether the so long as clause should appear at the beginning or the end.
zh: 使用 so long as 改寫以下句子，表達相同的條件。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。
請按照首字提示，判斷 so long as 子句應放在句首還是句尾。

questions.prompt: If you practise every day, you will improve your English.
questions.promptZh: 如果你每天練習，你的英文就會進步。
questions.answer: So long as you practise every day, you will improve your English.
questions.answerZh: 只要你每天練習，你的英文就會進步。
questions.highlight: So long as you practise every day, you will improve your English.

questions.prompt: You may borrow my pen provided that you return it after class.
questions.promptZh: 你可以借用我的筆，前提是你下課後歸還。
questions.answer: You may borrow my pen so long as you return it after class.
questions.answerZh: 只要你下課後歸還，你便可以借用我的筆。
questions.highlight: You may borrow my pen so long as you return it after class.

questions.prompt: We can have lunch outside on condition that the weather stays dry.
questions.promptZh: 我們可以在戶外吃午餐，條件是天氣保持乾爽。
questions.answer: So long as the weather stays dry, we can have lunch outside.
questions.answerZh: 只要天氣保持乾爽，我們便可以在戶外吃午餐。
questions.highlight: So long as the weather stays dry, we can have lunch outside.

questions.prompt: The baby will sleep well only if the room remains quiet.
questions.promptZh: 只有房間保持安靜，嬰兒才會睡得好。
questions.answer: The baby will sleep well so long as the room remains quiet.
questions.answerZh: 只要房間保持安靜，嬰兒便會睡得好。
questions.highlight: The baby will sleep well so long as the room remains quiet.

questions.prompt: Mia will be able to buy the bicycle if she saves enough money.
questions.promptZh: 如果米婭存到足夠的錢，她便能買那輛單車。
questions.answer: So long as Mia saves enough money, she will be able to buy the bicycle.
questions.answerZh: 只要米婭存到足夠的錢，她便能買那輛單車。
questions.highlight: So long as Mia saves enough money, she will be able to buy the bicycle.

questions.prompt: If everyone helps, we can finish the task today.
questions.promptZh: 如果每個人都幫忙，我們今天便能完成任務。
questions.answer: We can finish the task today so long as everyone helps.
questions.answerZh: 只要每個人都幫忙，我們今天便能完成任務。
questions.highlight: We can finish the task today so long as everyone helps.

questions.prompt: Provided that you follow the map, you will find the museum.
questions.promptZh: 只要你按照地圖走，你便會找到博物館。
questions.answer: So long as you follow the map, you will find the museum.
questions.answerZh: 只要你按照地圖走，你便會找到博物館。
questions.highlight: So long as you follow the map, you will find the museum.

questions.prompt: Jack may use the computer only if he finishes his homework first.
questions.promptZh: 傑克只有先完成家課，才可以使用電腦。
questions.answer: Jack may use the computer so long as he finishes his homework first.
questions.answerZh: 只要傑克先完成家課，他便可以使用電腦。
questions.highlight: Jack may use the computer so long as he finishes his homework first.

questions.prompt: The children can eat the soup now unless it is too hot.
questions.promptZh: 除非湯太熱，否則孩子們現在可以喝湯。
questions.answer: So long as the soup is not too hot, the children can eat it now.
questions.answerZh: 只要湯不太熱，孩子們現在便可以喝。
questions.highlight: So long as the soup is not too hot, the children can eat it now.

questions.prompt: If the plants receive enough sunlight, they will grow well.
questions.promptZh: 如果植物得到足夠陽光，它們便會生長良好。
questions.answer: The plants will grow well so long as they receive enough sunlight.
questions.answerZh: 只要植物得到足夠陽光，它們便會生長良好。
questions.highlight: The plants will grow well so long as they receive enough sunlight.

questions.prompt: A valid ticket is enough for you to enter the hall.
questions.promptZh: 只要持有有效門票，你便可以進入禮堂。
questions.answer: So long as your ticket is valid, you may enter the hall.
questions.answerZh: 只要你的門票有效，你便可以進入禮堂。
questions.highlight: So long as your ticket is valid, you may enter the hall.

questions.prompt: Your parents must give permission before you can join the trip.
questions.promptZh: 你必須先得到父母同意，才可以參加旅行。
questions.answer: You can join the trip so long as your parents give permission.
questions.answerZh: 只要你的父母同意，你便可以參加旅行。
questions.highlight: You can join the trip so long as your parents give permission.

questions.prompt: Provided the bus arrives on time, we will reach the airport before noon.
questions.promptZh: 前提是巴士準時到達，我們便會在中午前抵達機場。
questions.answer: So long as the bus arrives on time, we will reach the airport before noon.
questions.answerZh: 只要巴士準時到達，我們便會在中午前抵達機場。
questions.highlight: So long as the bus arrives on time, we will reach the airport before noon.

questions.prompt: The library can remain open if enough staff are available.
questions.promptZh: 如果有足夠職員當值，圖書館便可以繼續開放。
questions.answer: The library can remain open so long as enough staff are available.
questions.answerZh: 只要有足夠職員當值，圖書館便可以繼續開放。
questions.highlight: The library can remain open so long as enough staff are available.

questions.prompt: Your account should remain safe unless you share your password.
questions.promptZh: 除非你把密碼告訴別人，否則你的帳戶應能保持安全。
questions.answer: So long as you do not share your password, your account should remain safe.
questions.answerZh: 只要你不把密碼告訴別人，你的帳戶應能保持安全。
questions.highlight: So long as you do not share your password, your account should remain safe.

questions.prompt: Customers can return the item only if they keep the receipt.
questions.promptZh: 顧客只有保留收據，才可以退回貨品。
questions.answer: Customers can return the item so long as they keep the receipt.
questions.answerZh: 只要顧客保留收據，便可以退回貨品。
questions.highlight: Customers can return the item so long as they keep the receipt.

questions.prompt: Provided the road is clear, the driver can continue the journey.
questions.promptZh: 前提是道路暢通，司機便可以繼續行程。
questions.answer: So long as the road is clear, the driver can continue the journey.
questions.answerZh: 只要道路暢通，司機便可以繼續行程。
questions.highlight: So long as the road is clear, the driver can continue the journey.

questions.prompt: The team may use the sports hall, but they must leave it clean afterwards.
questions.promptZh: 球隊可以使用體育館，但使用後必須保持地方清潔。
questions.answer: The team may use the sports hall so long as they leave it clean afterwards.
questions.answerZh: 只要球隊使用後保持體育館清潔，便可以使用該場地。
questions.highlight: The team may use the sports hall so long as they leave it clean afterwards.

questions.prompt: If Emma takes the medicine correctly, she should feel better soon.
questions.promptZh: 如果艾瑪正確服藥，她應該很快便會好轉。
questions.answer: So long as Emma takes the medicine correctly, she should feel better soon.
questions.answerZh: 只要艾瑪正確服藥，她應該很快便會好轉。
questions.highlight: So long as Emma takes the medicine correctly, she should feel better soon.

questions.prompt: You may sit here on condition that you do not block the doorway.
questions.promptZh: 你可以坐在這裏，條件是不要阻塞門口。
questions.answer: You may sit here so long as you do not block the doorway.
questions.answerZh: 只要你不阻塞門口，便可以坐在這裏。
questions.highlight: You may sit here so long as you do not block the doorway.

questions.prompt: All group members must agree before we can change the presentation topic.
questions.promptZh: 所有組員必須同意，我們才可以更改簡報主題。
questions.answer: So long as all group members agree, we can change the presentation topic.
questions.answerZh: 只要所有組員同意，我們便可以更改簡報主題。
questions.highlight: So long as all group members agree, we can change the presentation topic.

questions.prompt: The school will approve the activity provided that it meets the safety rules.
questions.promptZh: 前提是活動符合安全規則，學校便會批准。
questions.answer: The school will approve the activity so long as it meets the safety rules.
questions.answerZh: 只要活動符合安全規則，學校便會批准。
questions.highlight: The school will approve the activity so long as it meets the safety rules.

questions.prompt: Switch off the machine first. Then you can clean it safely.
questions.promptZh: 先關掉機器，之後你便可以安全地清潔它。
questions.answer: So long as the machine is switched off first, you can clean it safely.
questions.answerZh: 只要先關掉機器，你便可以安全地清潔它。
questions.highlight: So long as the machine is switched off first, you can clean it safely.

questions.prompt: Visitors may take photographs if they do not use flash.
questions.promptZh: 如果訪客不使用閃光燈，便可以拍照。
questions.answer: Visitors may take photographs so long as they do not use flash.
questions.answerZh: 只要訪客不使用閃光燈，便可以拍照。
questions.highlight: Visitors may take photographs so long as they do not use flash.

questions.prompt: If the shop has the book in stock, I will buy it this afternoon.
questions.promptZh: 如果店舖有這本書的現貨，我今天下午便會購買。
questions.answer: So long as the shop has the book in stock, I will buy it this afternoon.
questions.answerZh: 只要店舖有這本書的現貨，我今天下午便會購買。
questions.highlight: So long as the shop has the book in stock, I will buy it this afternoon.

questions.prompt: We can reduce food waste provided that everyone takes only what they can eat.
questions.promptZh: 前提是每個人只拿自己吃得完的食物，我們便能減少食物浪費。
questions.answer: We can reduce food waste so long as everyone takes only what they can eat.
questions.answerZh: 只要每個人只拿自己吃得完的食物，我們便能減少食物浪費。
questions.highlight: We can reduce food waste so long as everyone takes only what they can eat.

questions.prompt: The doctor may allow the patient to go home provided she has no fever.
questions.promptZh: 前提是病人沒有發燒，醫生可能會讓她回家。
questions.answer: So long as the patient has no fever, the doctor may allow her to go home.
questions.answerZh: 只要病人沒有發燒，醫生可能會讓她回家。
questions.highlight: So long as the patient has no fever, the doctor may allow her to go home.

questions.prompt: The website will work properly only if your browser is up to date.
questions.promptZh: 只有你的瀏覽器是最新版本，網站才會正常運作。
questions.answer: The website will work properly so long as your browser is up to date.
questions.answerZh: 只要你的瀏覽器是最新版本，網站便會正常運作。
questions.highlight: The website will work properly so long as your browser is up to date.

questions.prompt: Children may enter the garden only when they are accompanied by an adult.
questions.promptZh: 兒童只有在成人陪同下，才可以進入花園。
questions.answer: So long as the children are accompanied by an adult, they may enter the garden.
questions.answerZh: 只要兒童有成人陪同，便可以進入花園。
questions.highlight: So long as the children are accompanied by an adult, they may enter the garden.

questions.prompt: The company can meet the deadline, but only if no further delays occur.
questions.promptZh: 公司可以趕上限期，但前提是不能再有延誤。
questions.answer: The company can meet the deadline so long as no further delays occur.
questions.answerZh: 只要不再出現延誤，公司便可以趕上限期。
questions.highlight: The company can meet the deadline so long as no further delays occur.

questions.prompt: You can collect your new card provided that you have completed the form.
questions.promptZh: 前提是你已填妥表格，你便可以領取新卡。
questions.answer: So long as you have completed the form, you can collect your new card.
questions.answerZh: 只要你已填妥表格，便可以領取新卡。
questions.highlight: So long as you have completed the form, you can collect your new card.

questions.prompt: Unless the rain becomes heavier, the match can continue.
questions.promptZh: 除非雨勢加劇，否則比賽可以繼續。
questions.answer: The match can continue so long as the rain does not become heavier.
questions.answerZh: 只要雨勢沒有加劇，比賽便可以繼續。
questions.highlight: The match can continue so long as the rain does not become heavier.

questions.prompt: The equipment can be used safely on condition that the instructions are followed carefully.
questions.promptZh: 只要仔細遵從指示，便可以安全使用設備。
questions.answer: So long as the instructions are followed carefully, the equipment can be used safely.
questions.answerZh: 只要仔細遵從指示，便可以安全使用設備。
questions.highlight: So long as the instructions are followed carefully, the equipment can be used safely.

questions.prompt: Residents may use the community room only if they book it in advance.
questions.promptZh: 居民只有預先預約，才可以使用社區活動室。
questions.answer: Residents may use the community room so long as they book it in advance.
questions.answerZh: 只要居民預先預約，便可以使用社區活動室。
questions.highlight: Residents may use the community room so long as they book it in advance.

questions.prompt: If no one objects, we can move the meeting to Friday.
questions.promptZh: 如果沒有人反對，我們便可以把會議改到星期五。
questions.answer: So long as no one objects, we can move the meeting to Friday.
questions.answerZh: 只要沒有人反對，我們便可以把會議改到星期五。
questions.highlight: So long as no one objects, we can move the meeting to Friday.

questions.prompt: The teacher will accept your project after the deadline provided that you explain the reason honestly.
questions.promptZh: 前提是你如實解釋原因，老師會接受你在限期後提交的專題作業。
questions.answer: The teacher will accept your project after the deadline so long as you explain the reason honestly.
questions.answerZh: 只要你如實解釋原因，老師便會接受你在限期後提交的專題作業。
questions.highlight: The teacher will accept your project after the deadline so long as you explain the reason honestly.

questions.prompt: The event may continue only if the emergency exit remains clear.
questions.promptZh: 只有緊急出口保持暢通，活動才可以繼續。
questions.answer: So long as the emergency exit remains clear, the event may continue.
questions.answerZh: 只要緊急出口保持暢通，活動便可以繼續。
questions.highlight: So long as the emergency exit remains clear, the event may continue.

questions.prompt: Unless you stream videos for hours, the phone battery should last all day.
questions.promptZh: 除非你連續數小時串流影片，否則手機電池應能使用一整天。
questions.answer: The phone battery should last all day so long as you do not stream videos for hours.
questions.answerZh: 只要你不連續數小時串流影片，手機電池應能使用一整天。
questions.highlight: The phone battery should last all day so long as you do not stream videos for hours.

questions.prompt: Everyone will have a chance to speak provided each speaker stays within the time limit.
questions.promptZh: 前提是每位講者都不超時，每個人都會有發言機會。
questions.answer: So long as each speaker stays within the time limit, everyone will have a chance to speak.
questions.answerZh: 只要每位講者都不超時，每個人都會有發言機會。
questions.highlight: So long as each speaker stays within the time limit, everyone will have a chance to speak.

questions.prompt: You may travel alone on condition that you keep your family informed.
questions.promptZh: 你可以獨自旅行，條件是要讓家人知道你的情況。
questions.answer: You may travel alone so long as you keep your family informed.
questions.answerZh: 只要你讓家人知道你的情況，便可以獨自旅行。
questions.highlight: You may travel alone so long as you keep your family informed.

questions.prompt: The manager will consider the proposal if the final report includes accurate figures.
questions.promptZh: 如果最終報告載有準確數據，經理便會考慮這項建議。
questions.answer: So long as the final report includes accurate figures, the manager will consider the proposal.
questions.answerZh: 只要最終報告載有準確數據，經理便會考慮這項建議。
questions.highlight: So long as the final report includes accurate figures, the manager will consider the proposal.

questions.prompt: The hospital can shorten waiting times provided extra staff are available during busy periods.
questions.promptZh: 前提是繁忙時段有額外職員當值，醫院便能縮短輪候時間。
questions.answer: The hospital can shorten waiting times so long as extra staff are available during busy periods.
questions.answerZh: 只要繁忙時段有額外職員當值，醫院便能縮短輪候時間。
questions.highlight: The hospital can shorten waiting times so long as extra staff are available during busy periods.

questions.prompt: The building must pass the safety inspection before the public may enter next week.
questions.promptZh: 大樓必須通過安全檢查，公眾下星期才可以進入。
questions.answer: So long as the building passes the safety inspection, the public may enter next week.
questions.answerZh: 只要大樓通過安全檢查，公眾下星期便可以進入。
questions.highlight: So long as the building passes the safety inspection, the public may enter next week.

questions.prompt: Students can choose their own research topic, but it must be related to the course.
questions.promptZh: 學生可以自行選擇研究題目，但題目必須與課程有關。
questions.answer: Students can choose their own research topic so long as it is related to the course.
questions.answerZh: 只要研究題目與課程有關，學生便可以自行選擇。
questions.highlight: Students can choose their own research topic so long as it is related to the course.

questions.prompt: If the delivery arrives before Friday, the team can complete the display on time.
questions.promptZh: 如果貨物在星期五前送達，團隊便能準時完成展覽佈置。
questions.answer: So long as the delivery arrives before Friday, the team can complete the display on time.
questions.answerZh: 只要貨物在星期五前送達，團隊便能準時完成展覽佈置。
questions.highlight: So long as the delivery arrives before Friday, the team can complete the display on time.

questions.prompt: The council may support the plan on condition that local residents are properly consulted.
questions.promptZh: 議會可能支持這項計劃，條件是必須妥善諮詢當區居民。
questions.answer: The council may support the plan so long as local residents are properly consulted.
questions.answerZh: 只要妥善諮詢當區居民，議會便可能支持這項計劃。
questions.highlight: The council may support the plan so long as local residents are properly consulted.

questions.prompt: Provided you have backed up your files, you can update the system without much risk.
questions.promptZh: 前提是你已備份檔案，你便可以在風險不高的情況下更新系統。
questions.answer: So long as you have backed up your files, you can update the system without much risk.
questions.answerZh: 只要你已備份檔案，便可以在風險不高的情況下更新系統。
questions.highlight: So long as you have backed up your files, you can update the system without much risk.

questions.prompt: The charity can expand the programme only if it receives enough long-term funding.
questions.promptZh: 慈善機構只有獲得足夠的長期資助，才可以擴展計劃。
questions.answer: The charity can expand the programme so long as it receives enough long-term funding.
questions.answerZh: 只要慈善機構獲得足夠的長期資助，便可以擴展計劃。
questions.highlight: The charity can expand the programme so long as it receives enough long-term funding.

questions.prompt: If everyone understands their role, the emergency plan should work effectively.
questions.promptZh: 如果每個人都明白自己的角色，緊急應變計劃應能有效運作。
questions.answer: So long as everyone understands their role, the emergency plan should work effectively.
questions.answerZh: 只要每個人都明白自己的角色，緊急應變計劃應能有效運作。
questions.highlight: So long as everyone understands their role, the emergency plan should work effectively.

questions.prompt: The company can offer flexible working hours provided that customer service is not affected.
questions.promptZh: 前提是顧客服務不受影響，公司便可以提供彈性工作時間。
questions.answer: The company can offer flexible working hours so long as customer service is not affected.
questions.answerZh: 只要顧客服務不受影響，公司便可以提供彈性工作時間。
questions.highlight: The company can offer flexible working hours so long as customer service is not affected.
